name: beehiiv-get-post-stats
description: Fetch engagement metrics for a specific Beehiiv post: recipients, open rate, click rate, unsubscribes, and spam reports. Use for conversion attribution, A/B test analysis, and triggering follow-up automations based on post performance.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Beehiiv API key (e.g. 'beehiiv/api_key').

PUBLICATION_ID.description: Beehiiv publication ID (e.g. 'pub_xxx...'). Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

POST_ID.description: Post ID to retrieve stats for (e.g. 'post_xxx...'). Use '{{post_id}}' to pull from an upstream beehiiv-create-post node. Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

LOW_OPEN_RATE_THRESHOLD.description: When set (e.g. 0.20 for 20%), the output includes a 'below_open_rate_threshold' boolean flag. Use downstream in condition nodes to trigger re-engagement automations when open rate is disappointing.

LOW_CLICK_RATE_THRESHOLD.description: When set (e.g. 0.03 for 3%), the output includes a 'below_click_rate_threshold' boolean flag for condition branching.

setup_instructions.title: Find your post ID
setup_instructions.detail: Post IDs are returned by beehiiv-create-post in the 'post_id' field. Alternatively, call GET https://api.beehiiv.com/v2/publications/{pubId}/posts to list all posts and find the ID.

setup_instructions.title: Automated performance alert pattern
setup_instructions.detail: Chain: [schedule trigger, 24h after post send] → [beehiiv-get-post-stats: LOW_OPEN_RATE_THRESHOLD=0.20] → [condition: below_open_rate_threshold == true] → [beehiiv-add-to-automation: re-send sequence] or [notification].

setup_instructions.title: Post-send upsell pattern
setup_instructions.detail: Chain: [beehiiv-create-post] → [wait 48h] → [beehiiv-get-post-stats: LOW_CLICK_RATE_THRESHOLD=0.05] → [condition: below_click_rate_threshold == false (performing well)] → [beehiiv-add-to-automation: upsell sequence for engaged readers].
